title: Conquest Survival+
description: Updated version of our classic pack.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V50LPVfNU_0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**Conquest Survival Plus** is an immersive Minecraft modpack that combines the best of exploration, survival, and RPG elements. Dive into a challenging world where strategic resource management, advanced crafting, and dynamic combat are key to thriving. Explore diverse biomes, encounter unique mobs, and discover hidden treasures while building and defending your stronghold against formidable adversaries. Perfect for players seeking a rich, engaging gameplay experience that tests their survival skills and creativity.

- ⚔️ Conquest Reforged
- ⚔️ Create for the purpose of water mills and windmills. 
- ⚔️ MineCraft Comes Alive
- ⚔️ Better Combat
- ⚔️ An Immersive Medieval RPG Experience
- ⚔️ In depth skill system
- ⚔️ Several classes to chose from, Knight, Ranger, Bard to name a few
- ⚔️ Mystic Mounts to find, tame, and ride
- ⚔️ Food, Food and more Food to cook/craft
- ⚔️ Crops from Croptopia and Farmers Delight
- ⚔️ Carts to help you farm, make paths, storage
- ⚔️ Live through the seasons of Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter.

**Note:** The pack should be run with 8 gig of ram selected. (especially with shaders on)
